mnemonics.title: XOAR Core Concept
mnemonics.content: XOAR = **D**ecompose + **L**east privilege. Think: **D**ivide and **L**imit. Break the monolith into compartments, limit each compartment's permissions. Result: reduced blast radius.

mnemonics.title: XOAR Benefits
mnemonics.content: **B**last radius reduced, **A**ttack surface smaller, **E**asier auditing, **P**atching independent, **M**onitoring improved = **BAEPM** (Think: **B**reak **A**pps **E**arly, **P**rotect **M**ore).
